title: Per-canonical module applicability table
description: Maps each canonical variable name (defined in variable_map.json) to the list of GEIH modules where the variable's source columns are expected to be present. Used by pulso._core.harmonizer to skip variables that cannot apply to the loaded module BEFORE harmonization is attempted, so they are never enumerated in the aggregated 'skipped during harmonization' UserWarning.

applicability.description: Map of canonical variable name -> list of module names. Every key MUST exist as a top-level entry in variable_map.json; every list element MUST exist as a key in sources.json's `modules` block.
